name: Over-Ear Headphones - heyday™ with Al Dettmann
description:
Experience great audio with the Over-Ear Headphones from heyday™, designed in collaboration with Al Dettmann. Designed for extended wear, these lightweight headphones feature plush foam ear cushions for a cozy fit. The 4-foot cord with a standard 3.5mm jack ensures compatibility with a variety of devices. Enjoy clear sound with the built-in microphone for hands-free calls. The botanical art design adds a unique flair, making these headphones not just functional but a true fashion statement.

About the artist: Al Dettmann is a queer fibers artist focusing on mixed-media & fine art practices. Growing up in Maine they have always been a creative spirit that loves exploring the natural environment and connecting with communities around the world. Earning their BFA in Fibers from Savannah College of Art and Design, they hope to share their love of color, hand-painted textures, and patchwork surfaces with communities of creatives. Currently based in Brooklyn, NY, Al’s greatest passion is to uplift queer voices through art & design and constantly create wonders that inspire all of us to live our messy lives beautifully, boldly, and authentically.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
